name: Skillsoft Percipio Learning Experience API
what_it_does: Skillsoft Percipio learning experience platform (LXP) REST API for enterprise compliance training, leadership development, and digital skills learning. Enables AI agents to manage learner enrollment and content assignment for automated corporate learning delivery, handle compliance channel completion tracking for regulatory training management, access Percipio learning path and collection management for structured development programs, retrieve learner activity and completion analytics for L&D intelligence reporting, manage AICC and SCORM content deployment for legacy content migration automation, handle xAPI statement retrieval for learning record data integration, access leadership and management development collection for executive learning automation, retrieve mentoring and coaching program data for talent development automation, manage AI-powered learning recommendation integration for personalized learning, and integrate Percipio with Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, Cornerstone, and HRIS for enterprise learning ecosystem.
use_cases: Delivering compliance training from regulatory learning agents
Developing leaders from talent management agents
Tracking digital skills from workforce development agents
Personalizing learning from AI recommendation agents
not_for: Frontline/deskless worker microlearning (use Axonify or Schoox)
Customer and partner education (use Northpass or Skilljar)
Technical developer training (use Pluralsight or LinkedIn Learning)
best_when: An enterprise organization wanting AI agents to automate compliance training delivery, leadership development, digital skills building, and learning analytics within Skillsoft Percipio with access to Skillsoft's extensive content library of 170,000+ digital learning assets.
avoid_when: SKILLSOFT PE AND SPAC FINANCIAL HISTORY: Skillsoft went public via SPAC in 2021 and has experienced significant financial restructuring; verify current financial stability, product investment roadmap, and API development commitment before multi-year integration. COMPLIANCE TRAINING AUDIT TRAIL SYSTEM OF RECORD: Percipio completion records are suitable for compliance tracking, but regulatory-mandated training for financial services, healthcare, or government requires supplemental audit trail if Percipio is not the designated LRS system of record; verify compliance record archiving requirements before sole reliance on Percipio. GDPR EU LEARNER DATA: Automated Percipio processing of EU employee learning data must comply with GDPR employment data provisions and Skillsoft data processing agreement; automated retention beyond legal period creates GDPR violation. CONTENT LIBRARY CURRENCY AND QUALITY VARIANCE: Skillsoft Percipio 170,000+ asset library has variable content quality and update frequency; automated course assignment for rapidly evolving technology topics may assign outdated content; implement content publication date filter for technology-specific assignments.

auth.notes: Skillsoft Percipio uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Nashua, New Hampshire HQ (Skillsoft, NYSE: SKIL). Skillsoft founded 1998; SPAC public 2021 (NYSE: SKIL). Acquired Global Knowledge (2021) and Codecademy (2022). Percipio is Skillsoft's modern LXP (2016). 170,000+ digital learning assets. 45M+ learners globally across 150+ countries. Leadership and business skills, compliance, technology, and digital fluency content. Competes with LinkedIn Learning, Pluralsight, and Udemy Business for enterprise content library.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-seat annual enterprise subscription with content library access
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription per seat; Custom pricing by user count and content library scope
pricing.notes: Nashua NH. Skillsoft NYSE:SKIL. SPAC 2021. Global Knowledge + Codecademy acquired. 170,000+ assets, 45M+ learners. Per-seat annual enterprise subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; completion and analytics API calls throttled per tier

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — COMPLETION EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Percipio does not support native webhooks for course completion or compliance channel events; automated compliance training tracking requires scheduled polling; implement polling frequency appropriate to regulatory deadline risk

SKILLSOFT FINANCIAL HISTORY AND PRODUCT STABILITY: Skillsoft has undergone Chapter 11 bankruptcy restructuring (2020), SPAC public listing (2021), and multiple acquisitions; verify current financial stability and API investment continuity before committing to multi-year Percipio integration dependency

CONTENT LIBRARY QUALITY VARIANCE FOR TECHNOLOGY TOPICS: Percipio 170,000+ asset library has significant quality and currency variance; technology-specific content may lag industry developments by months; implement content publication date filter (published within 12 months) for technology and cloud training course assignments

Codecademy integration API scope — Skillsoft acquired Codecademy (2022) for coding skills content; Codecademy content may have different API access patterns than core Percipio library; verify coding content access through Percipio API vs direct Codecademy API for automated developer training workflows

Compliance channel vs individual course tracking — Percipio organizes compliance content in Channels (grouped required courses); automated compliance tracking must track Channel completion, not individual courses; course-level completion without Channel completion reporting creates compliance audit gap for grouped regulatory training

xAPI LRS integration for compliance record archiving — Percipio supports xAPI statement delivery to external LRS; automated compliance record archiving to corporate LRS for long-term regulatory retention must be configured; reliance on Percipio internal completion storage alone creates data loss risk on Percipio subscription termination
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise LXP. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. Global. Employee learning and compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise LXP. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. Global. Employee learning and compliance training data.
